name: Cookies 'n' Creme Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Hershey's cookies 'n' creme bar (7 oz.) or:
8 oz Frozen non-dairy whipped topping; thawed
Sweetened whipped cream or non-dairy whipped topping (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove wrappers from candy and cut into pieces.
2. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, combine milk and miniature marshmallows. Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until the marshmallows are melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred. Add the candy pieces and stir until melted and well blended. Allow to cool completely.
3. Gently fold in the whipped topping into the marshmallow mixture. Spoon the mixture into the crust. Cover and freeze for several hours or until firm.
4. Garnish with sweetened whipped cream or whipped topping, if desired. Freeze leftovers. 6 to 8 servings.
